ntpq> version
ntpq 4.2.8p15@1.3728-o Thu Feb 18 07:28:11 UTC 2021 (1)
ntpq> 


is there any conf missing?
at initial stage only rc.conf done as below:
  ntpd_program="/usr/local/sbin/ntpd"
  ntpdate_program="/usr/local/sbin/ntpdate"
